part: My First Day in Middle School

tree.text: My first day in middle school was exciting and I was a little afraid!
tree.cn: 我在初中的第一天很兴奋，但我也有点害怕！
tree.notes: in middle school 在初中；exciting 令人兴奋的；a little 有点；afraid 害怕。
tree.statement: “a little”在句中修饰形容词 afraid，意为“一点点，稍微”。
tree.explanation: a little 可以用作程度副词，用来修饰形容词或副词，表示“有点儿，稍微”。
tree.keywords: first day, middle school, exciting, afraid

children.text: Everything looked so fresh—new buildings, a huge playground, and many new faces.
children.cn: 一切看起来都是那么新鲜——崭新的大楼、巨大的操场和许多新面孔。
children.notes: fresh 新鲜的，新奇的；new buildings 新大楼；huge playground 巨大的操场；new faces 新面孔。
children.statement: “looked”是感官动词，后面接形容词 fresh 作表语。
children.explanation: look 意为“看起来”，是系词（感官动词），后接形容词作表语。

children.text: I walked into my classroom and met my classmates.
children.cn: 我走进教室，见到了我的同学们。
children.notes: walk into 走进；classroom 教室；met 是 meet 的过去式；classmates 同班同学。
children.statement: and 连接两个并列谓语 walked 和 met，时态均为一般过去时。
children.explanation: and 连接并列的谓语动词时，它们要在时态上保持一致，这里都用过去式形式。

children.text: We smiled and said hello to each other.
children.cn: 我们相视而笑，互相打招呼。
children.notes: said hello to sb. 向某人问好/打招呼；each other 彼此，互相。
children.statement: each other 在句中作 said hello to 的宾语。
children.explanation: each other 意为“彼此，互相”，在介词 to 之后作宾语。

children.text: My teacher walked in and greeted us warmly.
children.cn: 我的老师走了进来，热情地向我们打招呼。
children.notes: walk in 走进来；greet sb. 向某人问候/打招呼；warmly 热情地（副词修饰动词 greeted）。
children.statement: warmly 是形容词，用来修饰名词 teacher。
children.explanation: warmly 是副词形式，在句中修饰动词 greeted，而不是修饰名词 teacher。

children.text: She told us about our class rules and subjects.
children.cn: 她告诉了我们班级规则和科目。
children.notes: tell sb. about sth. 告诉某人关于某事；class rules 班规；subjects 学科，科目。
children.statement: us 是宾格，在及物动词 told 后面作宾语。
children.explanation: tell 后面跟人称代词作宾语时，要用宾格形式 us，而不是主格 we。

children.notes: friendly 友好的（形容词，虽然以-ly结尾但不是副词）。
children.explanation: friendly 是形容词，作 was 的表语，表示“友好的”，虽然以 -ly 结尾，但它修饰主语 Everyone。

children.text: I felt happy and couldn't wait to learn more here.
children.cn: 我感到很高兴，迫不及待地想在这里学到更多。
children.notes: felt 是 feel 的过去式；can't wait to do sth. 迫不及待做某事；learn more 学习更多。
children.statement: can't wait to do sth. 的结构中，to 后面需要接动词原形。
children.explanation: can't wait to do sth. 意为“迫不及待做某事”，to 是不定式符号，后面必须接动词原形。
children.keywords: felt, happy, can't wait, learn more

children.notes: What a/an + adj. + n. + ! 引导感叹句。
children.statement: 这是一个由 How 引导的感叹句。
children.explanation: 这是由 What 引导的感叹句，结构为：What + a + 形容词 + 单数可数名词！

tree.text: My first day in middle school was both exciting and a little scary because everything was completely new to me.
tree.cn: 我在初中的第一天既令人兴奋又有点可怕，因为一切对我来说都是全新的。
tree.notes: both... and... 既……又……；scary 吓人的，可怕的；because 引导原因状语从句；completely 完全地（副词修饰形容词 new）。
tree.statement: both... and... 连接两个并列的形容词 exciting 和 scary 作表语。
tree.explanation: both... and... 意为“既……又……”，常用来连接两个并列的成分，此处连接两个形容词并作表语。
tree.keywords: both... and..., scary, because, completely new

children.text: When I entered the school gate, I was amazed by the modern buildings, the spacious playground, and the unfamiliar faces around me.
children.cn: 当我走进校门时，我被现代化的教学楼、宽敞的操场和周围陌生的面孔所惊艳。
children.notes: When 引导时间状语从句；enter the school gate 进校门；be amazed by 对……感到惊奇/惊艳；spacious 宽敞的；unfamiliar 陌生的。
children.statement: When 引导的是一个原因状语从句。
children.explanation: When 引导的是时间状语从句，意为“当……时候”，用来表达动作发生的时间。

children.text: As I walked into the classroom, I smiled at my classmates, and we greeted each other warmly.
children.cn: 当我走进教室时，我朝同学们微笑，我们热情地互相问候。
children.notes: As 引导时间状语从句，意为“当……时，随着”；smile at sb. 朝某人微笑；greet each other 互相问候。
children.statement: smile at 中的 at 是及物动词，后面直接跟人称代词。
children.explanation: smile 是不及物动词，不能直接跟宾语，必须和介词 at 连用才能接宾语。
children.keywords: As, walked into, smiled at, greeted, warmly

children.text: Soon after, our teacher came in and introduced the class rules and various subjects.
children.cn: 不久之后，我们的老师进来了，并介绍了班级规则和各种学科。
children.notes: Soon after 不久之后；introduce 介绍；various 各种各样的（形容词修饰 subjects）。
children.statement: various 是形容词，意为“各种各样的”，修饰名词 subjects。
children.explanation: various 意为“各不相同的，各种各样的”，常作定语修饰复数名词。
children.keywords: Soon after, came in, introduced, various subjects

children.text: Since everyone was extremely friendly, I didn't feel nervous anymore.
children.cn: 既然大家都非常友好，我就不再感到紧张了。
children.notes: Since 引导原因状语从句，意为“既然，由于”；extremely 极端地，非常（修饰 friendly）；not... anymore 不再……。
children.statement: not... anymore 意为“不再”，与 not... any longer 意思相近。
children.explanation: not... anymore 表示“不再”，常用于否定句中。
children.keywords: Since, extremely, feel nervous, not... anymore

children.text: In fact, I was so happy that I couldn't wait to start my new learning journey.
children.cn: 事实上，我是如此高兴，以至于迫不及待地想要开始我新的学习旅程。
children.notes: In fact 事实上（插入语）；so... that... 如此……以至于……；learning journey 学习旅程。
children.statement: so... that... 结构中，that 引导的是结果状语从句。
children.explanation: so... that... 表示“如此……以至于……”，其中 that 引导结果状语从句，表示前面的原因所产生的结果。
children.keywords: In fact, so... that..., learning journey

children.notes: beginning 开始，开端；What 引导的感叹句。
children.statement: beginning 是 begin 的现在分词形式，在句中作形容词。
children.explanation: beginning 在此是名词，意为“开始，开端”，而不是现在分词或形容词。
